## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change

What do you want added or changed?

## Why it fits this project

Explain why this belongs in a Gmail -> OpenClaw -> QQ self-hosted bridge, instead of a general mail client.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider?

## Additional context

Anything else that helps evaluate the proposal.
